title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to lead the design and development of next-generation search UI controls. You will collaborate with design teams and product owners to create premium user experiences.
requirements: B.S. in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience.
Professional software development experience building consumer-facing web products.
Expert knowledge of React, modern JavaScript frameworks, and CSS architecture.
responsibilities: Build highly responsive, accessible (A11y), and semantic web user interfaces.
Collaborate with backend engineers to define efficient GraphQL and REST APIs.
Mentor junior team members and conduct constructive code reviews.

title: Software Development Engineer II (React)
description: Amazon Web Services is looking for a Frontend Engineer to help build dynamic administration dashboards for serverless cloud offerings. Your work will empower millions of developers worldwide.
requirements: 3+ years of professional web development experience.
Strong understanding of React state management and asynchronous data flows.
Familiarity with cloud hosting services (AWS Amplify, S3, CloudFront).
responsibilities: Own frontend features from inception to deployment.
Optimize web portal performance for low-bandwidth and high-latency clients.
Write high-quality unit and integration tests.
benefits: Competitive base salary and sign-on bonus

title: Lead UI / UX Designer
description: Figma is seeking a Lead UI/UX Designer to own the evolution of our design system. You will research and design innovative vector editing tools and collaborative multiplayer features.
requirements: Portfolio demonstrating complex interaction design systems and research methodologies.
Experience conducting user interviews and usability tests.
Understanding of frontend styling capabilities (CSS Variables, Flexbox, CSS Grid).
responsibilities: Establish and distribute visual guidelines, layout templates, and icon libraries.
Deliver pixel-perfect visual mockups, wireframes, and animated prototypes.
Work closely with engineers to ensure design specifications are accurately met.

title: UI / UX Designer (Internship)
description: Adobe Creative Cloud is looking for a creative UI/UX intern for Fall 2026. You will work alongside senior designers to refine user flows, draft vector icons, and document research assets.
requirements: Currently enrolled in or recently graduated from a Design, HCI, or related degree.
Proficient with design applications (XD, Figma, Sketch).
Eager to learn, receive feedback, and iterate rapidly on layouts.
responsibilities: Create alternative layout structures and user flows for creative panels.
Participate in design critique sessions and document specifications.
Assist in preparing asset exports for desktop and mobile releases.
benefits: Paid mentorship from design industry veterans

title: Data Scientist - Personalization
description: We want an analytical Data Scientist to join our recommendation systems squad. You will design, build, and evaluate machine learning models that decide what shows users see on their homepages.
requirements: Master's or Ph.D. in Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or Quantitative field.
Deep understanding of probability theory, statistics, and machine learning models.
Expert SQL query construction and scripting in Python/R.
responsibilities: Build recommendation pipelines using collaborative filtering and neural models.
Conduct high-velocity A/B testing models on algorithmic parameters.
Present analysis results and dashboard models to product management.

title: Data Analyst (Contract)
description: Meta is hiring a contract Data Analyst to work with our Ads Integrity group. You will write complex queries to find anomalies, inspect bad actor trends, and construct visual dashboards.
requirements: 2+ years of experience in data analytics or business intelligence.
Advanced SQL skills (Window functions, CTEs, complex Joins).
Familiarity with visual analytics software like Tableau or PowerBI.
responsibilities: Extract and clean data streams from massive data warehouses.
Build, test, and maintain reporting dashboards for security leaders.
Document metrics calculations and summarize report sheets.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: We are seeking an energetic Digital Marketing Manager to guide our customer growth programs. You will run multi-channel campaigns, oversee budget allocations, and analyze conversions.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Business Administration.
Proven track record managing paid advertising budgets ($50k+/month).
Expert knowledge of search engine optimization (SEO) algorithms.
responsibilities: Design, build, and optimize paid acquisition campaigns across channels.
Create monthly performance dashboards covering ROI, CAC, and LTV.
Collaborate with content teams to deliver ads graphics and copywriting.
benefits: Free lunch vouchers and gym membership discounts

title: Financial Analyst - Strategic Planning
description: Microsoft is seeking a Financial Analyst to join our Gaming division (Xbox). You will evaluate investments, draft financial projections, and report performance to division leadership.
requirements: B.S. in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related fields.
Strong skills building corporate financial models and formulas in Excel.
Solid knowledge of corporate valuation and accounting principles.
responsibilities: Track and model monthly operating budgets, revenues, and costs.
Perform pricing elasticity and investment ROI simulations.
Prepare presentation decks for executive review boards.

title: Technical Recruiter

requirements: 2+ years of experience sourcing software engineers and product managers.
Proficient using applicant tracking databases (ATS) and LinkedIn Recruiter.
Stellar written communication skills and active outbound outreach experience.

title: Human Resources Coordinator

responsibilities: Coordinate weekly employee onboarding programs.

benefits: Free Spotify Premium accounts for life
6 months fully paid global parental leave

title: Frontend Developer (Internship)

Deep mathematical understanding of deep learning models.
